summary.intent: Fix two PR review comments on PR #785 in the moltis repo: guard against silent passkey loss when URL parsing yields an empty host, and add missing unit tests for effective_external_url env var precedence behavior.
summary.outcome: Both review comments were addressed: added an empty-host guard in post_state.rs, refactored effective_external_url into a testable pure function in system.rs, added 5 new unit tests in tests.rs, fixed all rustfmt formatting issues, and committed the changes.

repo: moltis uses nightly rustfmt with strict formatting requirements — all changed files must pass fmt checks before committing
The config crate has a dedicated tests.rs file for schema-level unit tests (crates/config/src/schema/tests.rs)
gateway and config are separate crates; gateway compiles independently from config tests
effective_external_url logic lives in crates/config/src/schema/system.rs and passkey host resolution lives in crates/gateway/src/server/prepare_core/post_state.rs

code.finding: unwrap_or_default() on URL host produces empty string for URLs like file:///path, which silently skips the localhost fallback — must guard against empty string explicitly
effective_external_url was not unit-testable as originally written; required refactor to expose a pure resolve_external_url function to enable isolated testing of env var precedence
5 new tests added covering resolve_external_url behaviors including env var set, env var unset, and edge cases

workflow: Formatting issues are common when making targeted edits — always run fmt verification before committing
Refactoring to a pure function is the idiomatic approach to making Rust methods unit-testable without spinning up full state
warn! macro lines can exceed line length limits and need manual wrapping to satisfy nightly rustfmt

friction: Multiple rounds of formatting fixes were needed across three files after the functional changes were complete
The warn! macro log line in post_state.rs required a separate formatting fix pass because it exceeded the line length limit
Formatting fixes required several edit iterations on tests.rs (3 separate edits) to get clean
